summary: The session focused on various learning models popular in US high schools, including Project-Based Learning, Traditional Classroom, and Flipped Classroom models. The user requested positively associated keywords for these models in different formats and later asked for additional learning models to be included in the list.
facts: The user requested information on popular learning models in US high schools. The user asked for positively associated keywords for each learning model in Python dictionary format. The user requested the same keywords formatted as a Python list of dictionaries. The user asked for five additional learning models to be included in the list. The additional learning models provided included Experiential Learning, Cooperative Learning, Gamification Learning, Competency-Based Learning, and Design Thinking Learning.
